---
title: "<i>Mission Field: A Monthly Record of the Proceedings of the Society for the Propagation of the Gospel at Home and Abroad, The</i>"
---

## <i>Mission Field: A Monthly Record of the Proceedings of the Society for the Propagation of the Gospel at Home and Abroad, The</i>

**Type:** periodical

### About

This periodical was the organ of the Society for the Propagation of the Gospel in Foreign Parts from 1856-1941.

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
